subject: Re: Moscow
body:
so is this through eu airspace?

> Flying through E.U. airspace requires increased

> after  the fact.

body_html:
so is this through eu airspace?

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

JFK - Keflavic (Iceland) 4+25 min
Keflavic - Moscow 4+10 min
Very good fuel stop.
Flying through E.U. airspace requires increased
insurance.
RANDOM checks MAY be imposed, my guess would be
after the fact.
Item #18

The Current List of EU Countries is identified
below. Source is
